name: C Hudson Thompson Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at C Hudson Thompson Memorial Park in Wallkill, NY! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Circleville Park
description: Circleville Park is a place to play pickleball in Wallkill, NY. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Craigville Park
description: Open to town and village residents of Goshen, NY

name: Cronomer Park
description: Cronomer Park is a place to play pickleball in Newburgh, NY. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.

name: Greenville Park
description: Greenville Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Jervis, NY. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Hansen Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Hansen Memorial Park in Westtown, NY! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: High Ridge Club
description: High Ridge Club is a place to play pickleball in Middletown, NY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, trainers or lessons, youth programming, and water. A membership is required to play.

name: Mombasha Park
description: Mombasha Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Monroe, NY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Montgomery Senior Center
description: Come play pickleball at Montgomery Senior Center in Montgomery, NY! There are 4 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are free.
hours: 8:30am - 4:30pm Home Government Departments Community Calendar Contact ©

name: Newburgh Pickleball Court
description: Come play pickleball at Newburgh Pickleball Court in Newburgh, NY! There are 4 outdoor clay courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: New York Military Academy (NYMA) Pickleball Courts
description: Come play pickleball at New York Military Academy (NYMA) Pickleball Courts in Cornwall-on-Hudson, NY! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are not available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.
open_play_schedule: NYMA is a school - periodically the facility hours will vary to accommodate other planned events
fees: Fee required — One time membership fee $25, members pay a $10 per session fee; non-member pays a $15 per session.

name: Pickleball Warehouse

name: Pine Island Park
description: Pine Island Park is a place to play pickleball in Pine Island, NY. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
